name: Aerosol Particle Size Distribution at Neumayer Station, Antarctica (2019)
description: Time-series dataset of aerosol particle number size distributions measured at Neumayer Station (SPUSO), Antarctica, starting January 1, 2019. The data includes particle concentrations (dN/dlogDp) across a diameter range from approximately 93 nm to 4846 nm, recorded at 7 meters elevation. Each record contains start and end timestamps, duration in minutes, and geospatial coordinates (Latitude: -70.65, Longitude: -8.25, Elevation: 42m).
